name: wp-document-revisions
description: Document management and version control for WordPress

scripts.build:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const devFiles=fs.readdirSync('js').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.dev.js')); devFiles.forEach(f=>{const min=f.replace('.dev.js','.js'); if(!fs.existsSync('js/'+min)){console.error('Missing: '+min);process.exit(1);}; console.log('OK: '+f+' -> '+min);})"

author: WP Document Revisions Contributors
